summary: Tested BusinessSettingsPage (5 tabs) and verified scheduler bug fix. All features working correctly.

fixed.issue: Scheduler error: send_appointment_reminder() got an unexpected keyword argument 'appointment_date'
fixed.root_cause: Server was running with cached code. The fix was already in server.py (using date=, time=, worker_name= parameters) but needed cache clear and restart.
fixed.fix_applied: Cleared __pycache__ and restarted backend. Scheduler now sends reminders successfully.
fixed.verification: Logs show 'Reminder sent for booking...' instead of errors

passed_tests: GET /api/businesses/me/private-info returns RFC, CLABE, legal_name, subscription_status - PASSED
GET /api/businesses/me/dashboard returns business with location - PASSED
Settings page loads with 5 tabs (Informacion, Documentos, Suscripcion, Ubicacion, Vetos) - PASSED
Info tab shows name, email, phone, description with Edit button - PASSED
Edit mode shows name input and description textarea - PASSED
Documents tab shows Razon Social, RFC (masked/revealed), CLABE (masked/revealed) - PASSED
Subscription tab shows 'Periodo de prueba' badge and $39 MXN/mes plan - PASSED
Location tab shows map with current location and search input - PASSED
Vetos tab shows add form (email, phone, reason) and empty list message - PASSED
Scheduler sends appointment reminders without errors - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: BusinessSettingsPage.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
The isManager check correctly hides Documents and Subscription tabs for managers
RFC and CLABE masking works correctly with toggle buttons
Location search uses Nominatim API for address lookup
Scheduler fix was already in code but needed cache clear - consider adding cache clear to deployment process
seed_data_creation: Created and removed test blacklist entry: test_blacklist_pytest@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: BusinessSettingsPage fully tested with all 5 tabs working. Scheduler bug was fixed by cache clear and restart. The private-info endpoint returns all required fields (RFC, CLABE, legal_name, subscription_status, etc.). Blacklist CRUD operations work correctly.

mocked_apis_list: Cloudinary (falls back to Emergent Object Storage)
Email Resend (configured but may be mocked in dev)

scheduler_verification.before: send_appointment_reminder() got an unexpected keyword argument 'appointment_date'
scheduler_verification.after: Reminder sent for booking 07337f05-c459-472c-90b1-0b49294d161f to testrealstripe@bookvia.com
scheduler_verification.fix_details: Cleared Python cache (__pycache__) and restarted backend. The code fix (date=, time=, worker_name= parameters) was already in place.
